raw_data.name: Flora Coffee

popular_times.title: Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets

raw_data.typical_time_spent: People typically spend 10 min to 1 hr here

reviews_data.review_text:
Super unique cafe.  LOTS of plants, massive chunks of cake, large cookies, and plenty of cafe drinks.

I love the use of a deck of cards to keep track of orders.  That’s super cute.

Every seating area was unique and cozy.
Such a cute coffee shop!
Combining two of the best things on the planet. Adorable, welcoming atmosphere with delicious eats and drinks. Oh, did I mention they sell plants too!

This is such a great local coffee shop in rock hill! The people who work there are always super sweet and kind! The interior is so unique and super great for going and doing work! The only thing is every time I order coffee, it's lukewarm and cools down in 10 minutes.
Recently became of my all time favorite coffee shops, and I’ve been to a lot. It’s so cute, coffee is unique and tasty, and the food is delicious too. Thank you for coming to Rock Hill, Flora! 👏
It was good 👍  cute little place! Very pretty esthetic.

A fantastic local coffee shop addition to Rock Hill. Great coffee and food. Aesthetics are A++. Beautiful re-design of the former Groucho’s Deli location.

Support local business and check this place out!
Definitely best coffee shop in Rock Hill. Great balance of sweet and nutty flavor.

Lovely coffee shop. Love the branding and decor. Was more than impressed when ordering espresso, it was served with some bubbly water as an accouterment. You can tell this is a 'coffee-forward' café. The banana bread was also super rich and delicious.

Drinks are deliciously balanced, atmosphere is peaceful but upbeat, and the staff are consistently the friendliest of any coffee house I've probably ever been to. The plants everywhere add to the peaceful, down to earth feel but they're also for sale so it's a neat little community. Probably too often I work from here for 2-3 hours and they've not kicked me out yet (I always make sure to buy food and drink and tip well so I'm not mooching!) and it's right across from the college so it's always full of people studying or taking study breaks to catch up with friends. Definitely as social or introverted as you'd like.
Amazing atmosphere. Always interesting new items to try with excellent service.
wow. truly at a loss for words for the rosemary miso latte i ordered. just wow.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Quaint coffee shop. They make their own syrups. Nice sitting areas. Service was great!

Visiting family from Charleston, SC — Ended up making a latte stop here twice! Dare I say… best coffee of my life? 👀 The roast has such a good creamy/nutty flavor. Such a cool atmosphere too with the plant shop. 10/10
This is a lovely spot with a great atmosphere. The coffee and food are well-prepared.

I think this will be one of my new favorite places. The banana cream chai is delicious and the spicy garlic crunch bagel is amazing. All of the people there are super sweet and friendly! I highly recommend! ❤️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so so much for your kind words. We are thrilled to hear you’ll be back :)
reviews_data.review_text:
I’ve found my new happy place. The atmosphere has that real coffee shop vibe, and the staff couldn’t be nicer—warm, welcoming, and genuinely kind. The baked goods are next level.

Here’s the clincher for me: I’m not a coffee drinker, so finding a place that takes tea seriously matters—and their London Fog hot tea is hands down the best I’ve ever had. Truly heavenly. And for the coffee lovers? They’re clearly doing something right.

It’s also just a wonderful place to linger, read, work, or meet up—one of those spaces you don’t want to rush through. This will absolutely be my new go-to spot.
Five stars all around! Love the ambiance and the rosemary coffee was so good. Raven took my order- she was so helpful and friendly! Will be coming back with the whole family soon. :)
Love Flora Coffee! Fresh baked goods in house and the chai is amazing. Highly recommend.

reviews_data.owner_answer: BRB while we all go cry with joy 🥹 thank you so much for your kind words, it truly means a lot to us.
reviews_data.review_text: I LOVE Flora!! The staff so quickly become like your friends, the coffee is next level delicious, and the pastries are *chef’s kiss*. When I’m having a bad day, I can come to Flora and immediately feel lighter. They have truly built a cafe of love and quality products. Not to mention, they double as a plant shop, so it’s my two favorite hobbies combined into one intentional, beautiful space. You’re the best, Flora!
Awesome place !!
Staff was very friendly and pleasant, and the atmosphere was great! The cookies were to die for!! The coffee was the best coffee I have had in a coffee shop ever. Will definitely be back!!!
An incredibly charming spot to enjoy a great latte and spend some “unwind time”. Don’t forget the sweets. I had a brown butter chocolate chip cookie that was ethereal!
So good! Please keep the glazed rum cake latte full time! 🙏🙏
What a cute coffee shop! Delicious drinks, good atmosphere. Will go back!
What a great find!  Sierra made two delicious … and beautiful lattes! And lovely drip coffee presentation too!
Friendly staff, great matcha latte, lovely vibes.
Relaxing environment and amazing tea!

I can't say enough great things about this awesome coffee shop! It is everything a knitting/crochet ,or  book girly needs and wants. I could literally spend hours here! The coffee is delicious and the food... was so good I couldnt wait to eat it!
If you need a place to focus, chill out and meet with friends over coffee and treats... look no further Flora is your place!

I have come to Flora a few times, and it’s always a pleasant experience; sweet people, a sweet iced chai latte (the best in Rock Hill in my opinion), and a sweet aesthetic! I went in yesterday and wound up crying in the coffee shop—my worst nightmare 🤣. But a kind woman who works here, who I never caught the name of, came up to me and told me that someone had gifted me a $20 gift card. If that someone sees this, I appreciate your kindness. I wish you all the warmth and sweetness in life, and I hope you know just how much that meant to me. After that, I think my lens on life changed for a little while and the day only continued to get better. Thank you 🫶🫶
Amazing coffee, amazing ambience.
Got an amazing chai, the server was super kind! The syrups look to be made in cafe which I love to support as homemade always tastes better! Can't wait until I can come again!

I’m a straight latte person but ordered mine with cardamom and Wow, changing my mind about straight ups.  And the vegetarian quiche is the best I’ve had anywhere.
Flora is so beautiful inside, lots of relax spots, plants.  Wish I lived closer!!
Great vibes, excellent Cortado! If you like authentic coffee driven cafés, check them out! Also have some great @ThePotSpotclt concrete pots+merch to pickup as well.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: Such a cute coffee shop! Super bright with lots of plants, a lot of people working on laptops. Coffee was delicious and so was their breakfast sandwich! I love that their syrups are homemade. So happy to have this new spot down the road, will definitely be back!

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: Phenomenal shop with quality coffee and kind staff. The seating area feels like a cozy nook in your living room, and the wide selection of plants gives the whole place a warm and inviting atmosphere. I appreciated the seasonal drink choices and baked goods selection.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: What a beautiful atmosphere and strong coffee to boot! New favorite spot for sure!

I’ve loved every experience I’ve had at flora… and there’s been many over the last few weeks. This has quickly become my go-to spot for a great breakfast sandwich, the best dirty chai I’ve ever had, and the friendliest baristas. Everything about flora is a 5/5.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking
review_questions.Vegetarian offerings: Vegetarian menu or section, Clearly labeled vegetarian dishes

reviews_data.review_text:
A beautiful space, wonderful staff, and the most sublime shot of espresso I've had all year. Absolutely worth the visit, top marks all around. Looking forward to going back already ✌🏼

If you're into plants, they have a beautiful array of houseplants and gorgeous concrete pots made in house (!) for you to browse.

Rock Hill is super lucky to have Flora, what a spot! Thanks to the staff for taking such great care of us!
These girls know how to make a matcha.

My wife and I have been not so patiently waiting for these fine folks to have their own brick and mortar. The faces? Friendly! The vibe? So cozy! The coffee? Both discerningly sourced and tasty! Very pleased with our experiences so far. Knowledge of and skill with the barista craft is obviously passion based, and the thoughtfulness shows with each product and piece of decor. Thanks for all your effort!
Love Flora so much! The drinks and food are so good and the vibes are so cozy and amazing! <3

reviews_data.owner_answer: We so appreciate your ongoing support!! We’ll see you soon.
reviews_data.review_text: I have been doing business with these young ladies since they had a cart at the local farmers market.    They are smart, hard working and I am so glad that they opened up a storefront.  All my meetings will be there when possible in RockHill.  I just had my first experience at the store front and they did not disappoint.   Ask them about bottling there syrup for home and they may even do that for you!  Support small business, they are the life line of our economy!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much!
reviews_data.review_text: i wish yall were here when i was still a WU student!! thankfully im still close by and can enjoy the coffee, homemade syrups, and absolutely beautiful atmosphere

reviews_data.owner_answer: Such a kind review. Thank you so much for coming by!
reviews_data.review_text: This place is so cute! It feels very open, and the decoration and florals feel very calming and inviting. I got the matcha with rum cake syrup and one of their muffins, and they were very tasty! Definitely a great place to come and relax with a book and a coffee or for the cozy calm vibes.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for supporting our business!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: I used to have to drive all the way from York to the Charlotte Regional Farmers Market for this coffee bc I’m so obsessed. 10/10 I love this place so much. Tried the breakfast sandwich for the first time today, also 10/10 amazing. Inside is so cute and cozy, staff is amazing, totally obsessed with this place.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: Great coffee and a really nice place! Can’t wait to try other things

reviews_data.owner_answer: We really appreciate it!!
reviews_data.review_text: Everyone is incredibly nice and the coffee is honestly some of the best in town.
Amazing coffee waaaayyyyy better than the big green coffee squid… say what you will about the all gender restrooms.
Great atmosphere and even better coffee. Best dirty chai I’ve ever had

I LOVED FLORA! I went for the first time yesterday. When I walked in, I could feel how cozy the atmosphere was. The color palette, plants, and available seating options create an environment that’s welcoming and inviting. You walk up the stairs to order at the counter. The ladies who helped me were so so so kind and hospitable. I ordered a matcha and added their rum cake syrup. I also got a bagel with chocolate chip cookie cream cheese. Both were a 10/10. I then impulse bought a container of matcha they had available. My order came to me really quick, but I was able to browse their plants and tshirts while I waited. I’ve already recommended this place to five of my friends. Parking is a little tough, but it’s not Flora’s fault. The parking lot has been funky since Groucho’s has been there. Please go visit Flora!!!

Flora has everything. A bright and nostalgic ambiance greets you as soon as you walk in. The coffee is prepared perfectly every time, as is the matcha. The baked goods are insane and I can’t wait for the full food menu. I’m a biased reviewer as my wife is one of the owners but with absolute sincerity the service and flavor here is simply top notch. I’m so proud of these three for working so hard to make this shop what it is. 10/10

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the kind words!
reviews_data.review_text: The ambiance is absolutely delightful. The cortado is perfect - bright espresso flavors with a touch of steamed milk. Perfect.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for coming by!
reviews_data.review_text: Truly what rock hill needs! Ample seating and a parking lot! I had an iced coffee and my gf got a brown sugar cinn iced latte and both were super tasty. If yer in the neighborhood do not skip this spot!!
Coffee is amazing and premium customer service! Highly recommend!!
Can’t wait for Flora Coffee to open!  I have enjoyed their coffee a few times at their pop up places!  Best coffee ever!
Grabbed a cappuccino from their cart at the Charlotte Regional Farmers Market on Saturday. It was delicious, and they were super friendly. Definitely worth checking out!

I cannot waiiit for Flora’s brick and mortar to open! In the meantime, I’ve been going to the regional farmers market to get my fix. Their rum cake syrup is a must if you catch it in season! And don’t sleep on the chai and matcha 🫢 🤤
And If you need a new drink, they’ve got the best recommendations! Service is always impeccable and the vibes are top notch!
